Source   Edit  

Economy resolution - Income, construction, and maintenance operations

This module handles all economy-related resolution including:

  • Income phase with resource collection and espionage effects
  • Build orders and construction management
  • Squadron management and fleet organization
  • Cargo management for spacelift ships
  • Population transfers via Space Guild
  • Terraforming operations
  • Maintenance phase with upkeep and effect tracking

Construction & Commissioning Phase Architecture

This module handles construction and commissioning because these operations represent the economic/industrial workflow of turning treasury resources into operational military units. The flow is:

  1. Build Phase (resolveBuildOrders):
    • Houses spend treasury on construction projects
    • Progress tracks toward completion over multiple turns
    • Represents shipyard/factory industrial capacity
  2. Commissioning Phase (within construction completion):
    • Completed ships are added to colony.unassignedSquadrons
    • Represents the "delivery" of industrial output
  3. Fleet Organization Phase (autoBalanceSquadronsToFleets):
    • Unassigned squadrons are organized into operational fleets
    • New fleets are created if no stationary fleets exist
    • Only Active fleets are considered (excludes Reserve/Mothballed)
    • Represents the transition from industrial output to military readiness

This architecture keeps the economic turn resolution (treasury → ships → fleets) separate from tactical fleet operations (movement, combat, espionage) which are handled in fleet_orders.nim and combat_resolution.nim.

The auto-fleet creation here enables newly-built units (especially scouts) to immediately begin operational duties without requiring explicit player orders.

Phase 3: Command

Imports

../../common/hex, ../../common/types/core, ../../common/types/units, ../../common/types/tech, ../gamestate, ../orders, ../fleet, ../squadron, ../spacelift, ../starmap, ../../common/logger, ../state_helpers, ../iterators, ../economy/types, ../economy/engine, ../economy/construction, ../economy/maintenance, ../economy/maintenance_shortfall, ../research/types, ../research/costs, ../research/effects, ../research/advancement, ../espionage/types, ../espionage/engine, ../diplomacy/types, ../diplomacy/proposals, ../blockade/engine, ../intelligence/detection, ../intelligence/types, ../intelligence/generator, ../intelligence/starbase_surveillance, ../intelligence/scout_intel, ../population/types, ../population/transfers, ../combat/fighter_capacity, ../config/espionage_config, ../config/population_config, ../config/ground_units_config, ../config/gameplay_config, ../config/military_config, ../colonization/engine, types, fleet_orders

                        events: var seq[GameEvent]) {.
    ...raises: [IOError, KeyError, Exception],
    tags: [TimeEffect, WriteIOEffect, RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Process construction orders for a house with budget validation Prevents overspending by tracking committed costs Source   Edit

    ...raises: [IOError, KeyError], tags: [TimeEffect, WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}

                        orders: Table[HouseId, OrderPacket]) {.
    ...raises: [IOError, KeyError, ValueError, Exception],
    tags: [TimeEffect, WriteIOEffect, RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Phase 2: Collect income and allocate resources Production is calculated AFTER conflict, so damaged infrastructure produces less Also applies ongoing espionage effects (SRP/NCV/Tax reductions) Source   Edit
